title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #6 as the Colosseum fighters, Tontatta rebellion, and Straw Hat alliance move closer to the same target: Doflamingo’s hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, come on back now. You won't get away this time, strawhat....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I thought I already told ya. I won't let you kill him.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Get in my way and I'll cut you down as well, Barto- Lomeo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How inter- Eating!!! So that's how it is!!!

summary: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
